mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates eliminate discount rate headwinds for equity valuations, generating positive forward returns as liquidity conditions remain accommodative.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS < 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals accelerating labor market recovery, which drives corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are negative in >60% of instances when UNRATE drops >0.2pp.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand recovery, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next month as earnings expectations rise.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 20d returns with a Rank IC > 0.05 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during the post-shock recovery phase reflects improving manufacturing activity, which translates to positive short-term equity returns as supply chain bottlenecks ease.
failure_condition: INDPRO month-over-month growth does not correlate with 5-day forward returns (Rank IC < 0.02) during the 2009-2010 recovery period.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month CPI increase exceeding 0.4% triggers inflation fears and expectations of premature monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes >0.4% m/m are followed by positive 20d returns in >50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent payroll growth and unemployment rate declines indicate structural labor market improvement, which sustains consumer spending and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term between PAYEMS growth and UNRATE decline yields a negative or insignificant coefficient in a 60-day return regression over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter GDP growth during a mid-cycle expansion confirms economic momentum, supporting corporate profitability and generating positive forward equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates fail to predict 60-day forward returns with a Rank IC > 0.04 during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production crossing above its 2017 base level of 100 signals a return to trend capacity utilization, which boosts industrial sector earnings and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO levels above 100 are followed by negative 20d returns in >55% of observations.
